name: Baseline
description: Initial baseline with ISNA hardcoded for all regions
notes: Ground truth from Aladhan API with correct regional methods. High WMAE driven by wrong method selection (ISNA for all) and eval day-rollover bug.

name: Regional method auto-selection
description: Auto-detect country from coordinates, select correct calculation method
changes: Country-to-method mapping: Moroccoâ†’18Â°/17Â°, Saudiâ†’UmmAlQura, Turkeyâ†’Diyanet, Egyptâ†’Egyptian, UKâ†’MoonsightingCommittee, Malaysiaâ†’JAKIM, USAâ†’ISNA
notes: Fajr improved significantly. Isha still dominated by eval day-rollover bug and high-latitude edge cases.

name: Fajr calibration and method refinement
description: Improved Fajr accuracy, London Isha fix with MoonsightingCommittee
notes: Incremental improvements. Main WMAE unchanged due to Isha domination.

name: High-latitude Isha fix + eval day-rollover bug
description: Fixed post-midnight Isha parsing in eval, Norway MiddleOfTheNight rule, Finland bounding box fix
changes: 1) eval.js: post-midnight Isha day-rollover fix. 2) engine.js: Norwayâ†’MiddleOfTheNight, Finland bounding box priority fix
notes: Major breakthrough. WMAE dropped 89% from 21.39 to 2.31 min. Now approaching Young (2006) Â±2 min atmospheric floor.

name: Elevation corrections
description: Geometric horizon dip correction applied to Shuruq and Maghrib for elevated cities
changes: applyElevationCorrection() activated in prayerTimes(): arccos horizon dip with latitude-adjusted 4/cos(Ď†) min/Â° formula applied to Shuruq and Maghrib
notes: WMAE WORSENED: 2.31 â†’ 2.99. Reverted. Root cause: Aladhan ground truth uses sea-level calculations â€” elevation correction diverges from it. Shuruq MAE: 2.02 â†’ 4.37, Maghrib: 2.29 â†’ 4.70. The correction is geometrically correct but the eval ground truth doesn't include it. Relevant when ground truth is also elevation-corrected.

name: Reykjavik Isha refinement
description: Iceland switched from TwilightAngle to MiddleOfTheNight to match Aladhan latitudeAdjustmentMethod=1
changes: engine.js: Iceland case split from Finland â€” Icelandâ†’HighLatitudeRule.MiddleOfTheNight, Finland remains TwilightAngle
notes: WMAE improved 21%: 2.31 â†’ 1.83. Fajr: 2.92 â†’ 1.67, Isha: 3.16 â†’ 2.17. MiddleOfNight matches Aladhan's latitudeAdjustmentMethod=1. Reykjavik Isha discrepancy reduced from ~24â€“36 min to ~10 min.

name: Add 5 more cities
description: Fetched Jakarta, Karachi, Dubai, Paris, Toronto from Aladhan API â€” expanded dataset from 172 to 222 entries
changes: eval/data/train/: jakarta.json (JAKIM 20Â°/18Â°), karachi.json (Karachi 18Â°/18Â°), dubai.json (UmmAlQura), paris.json (UOIF 12Â°/12Â°), toronto.json (ISNA). engine.js: detectCountry + selectMethod for Indonesia, Pakistan, UAE, France, Canada. eval.js: 5 new UTC offsets.
notes: WMAE improved 15%: 1.83 â†’ 1.55. All per-prayer MAEs below 2 min. Dataset now covers 18 cities across 15 countries. Generalization holds: new cities match expected accuracy. Now well below Young (2006) Â±2 min floor on a per-prayer average basis.
